SEARCH
Package memory.controller

Class GameController

java.lang.Object
memory.controller.GameController
All Implemented Interfaces:
GameModelListener
public class GameController extends Object implements GameModelListener
Controller for the game view (GameView.fxml), implements GameModelListener.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Stefan Malesevic

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    buildBoard()
    Creates a button for every card position and adds it to the GridPane.
    private String
    buildResultMessage()
    Builds the result message shown in the game-over dialog.
    private int
    computeCardSize(int rows, int cols)
    Returns an appropriate card size in pixels based on the board dimensions.
    private javafx.scene.control.Button
    createCardButton(int row, int col, int cardSize)
    Creates a card button and wires it to GameModel.flipCard(int, int).
    void
    initGame(GameConfig config)
    Initialises the game view with the given configuration.
    void
    newGame(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
    Returns to the start menu.
    void
    onCardFlipped()
    Called after a card has been flipped.
    void
    onCardsHidden()
    Called after mismatched cards have been flipped back.
    void
    onGameOver()
    Called when all pairs have been found.
    void
    onPairMatched(int row1, int col1, int row2, int col2)
    Called when two revealed cards form a matching pair.
    void
    onPairMismatched(int row1, int col1, int row2, int col2)
    Called when two revealed cards do not match.
    private void
    refreshBoard()
    Refreshes all card buttons to reflect the current model state.
    private void
    showGameOverDialog()
    Shows an information dialog with the final game result.
    private void
    updateCardButton(int row, int col)
    Updates the style and text of the card button at the given position.
    private void
    updateStatus()
    Updates the status bar with the active player, scores, and move count.

  • Method Details

    • initGame

      public void initGame(GameConfig config)
      Initialises the game view with the given configuration.
      Parameters:
      config - the configuration chosen in the start menu

    • buildBoard

      private void buildBoard()
      Creates a button for every card position and adds it to the GridPane.

    • computeCardSize

      private int computeCardSize(int rows, int cols)
      Returns an appropriate card size in pixels based on the board dimensions.
      Parameters:
      rows - number of rows
      cols - number of columns
      Returns:
      card size in pixels

    • createCardButton

      private javafx.scene.control.Button createCardButton(int row, int col, int cardSize)
      Creates a card button and wires it to GameModel.flipCard(int, int).
      Parameters:
      row - row index of the card
      col - column index of the card
      cardSize - button size in pixels
      Returns:
      the configured button

    • refreshBoard

      private void refreshBoard()
      Refreshes all card buttons to reflect the current model state.

    • updateCardButton

      private void updateCardButton(int row, int col)
      Updates the style and text of the card button at the given position.
      Parameters:
      row - row index of the card
      col - column index of the card

    • updateStatus

      private void updateStatus()
      Updates the status bar with the active player, scores, and move count.

    • onCardFlipped

      public void onCardFlipped()
      Description copied from interface: GameModelListener
      Called after a card has been flipped.
      Specified by:
      onCardFlipped in interface GameModelListener

    • onPairMatched

      public void onPairMatched(int row1, int col1, int row2, int col2)
      Description copied from interface: GameModelListener
      Called when two revealed cards form a matching pair.
      Specified by:
      onPairMatched in interface GameModelListener
      Parameters:
      row1 - row of the first card
      col1 - column of the first card
      row2 - row of the second card
      col2 - column of the second card

    • onPairMismatched

      public void onPairMismatched(int row1, int col1, int row2, int col2)
      Description copied from interface: GameModelListener
      Called when two revealed cards do not match. The listener must subsequently call GameModel.hideCards().
      Specified by:
      onPairMismatched in interface GameModelListener
      Parameters:
      row1 - row of the first card
      col1 - column of the first card
      row2 - row of the second card
      col2 - column of the second card

    • onCardsHidden

      public void onCardsHidden()
      Description copied from interface: GameModelListener
      Called after mismatched cards have been flipped back.
      Specified by:
      onCardsHidden in interface GameModelListener

    • onGameOver

      public void onGameOver()
      Description copied from interface: GameModelListener
      Called when all pairs have been found.
      Specified by:
      onGameOver in interface GameModelListener

    • showGameOverDialog

      private void showGameOverDialog()
      Shows an information dialog with the final game result.

    • buildResultMessage

      private String buildResultMessage()
      Builds the result message shown in the game-over dialog.

    • newGame

      public void newGame(javafx.event.ActionEvent event) throws IOException
      Returns to the start menu.
      Parameters:
      event - the ActionEvent from the "New Game" button
      Throws:
      IOException - if MenuView.fxml cannot be loaded
